missing_handrail.description: Install compliant handrails on ramp or stairs

narrow_doorway.description: Widen doorway to meet 32-inch clear width minimum

round_door_knob.description: Replace round knob with lever handle

missing_accessible_parking_sign.description: Install ISA parking sign at 60 inches minimum height

missing_parking_striping.description: Paint or repaint accessible parking striping and access aisle

missing_curb_cut.description: Install curb ramp with detectable warning surface

missing_tactile_signage.description: Install ADA-compliant raised character and Braille sign

missing_grab_bars.description: Install stainless steel grab bar with proper backing

blocked_accessible_route.description: Remove or relocate obstructions from accessible route

no_accessible_entrance.description: Create accessible entrance with ramp, door modifications, and signage

step_only_entrance.description: Add ramp or lift to eliminate step-only entrance

protruding_objects.description: Relocate, recess, or add cane-detectable barrier below protruding object

inaccessible_counter.description: Lower a 36-inch section of counter or add auxiliary counter

missing_directional_signage.description: Install directional signs with ISA to accessible features

steep_ramp.description: Rebuild ramp to meet 1:12 maximum slope requirement

missing_detectable_warnings.description: Install truncated dome detectable warning surface

inaccessible_restroom.description: Renovate restroom for full ADA compliance
